---
title: "This is a surprise tool that'll help us later!"
date: "03/28/2026"
author: "Ashley E. Mullan"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
---


## Sometimes, Mickey Mouse Clubhouse gets it right.

Ever heard of the [Mickey Mouse Clubhouse](https://disney.fandom.com/wiki/Mickey_Mouse_Clubhouse) bit where they talk about surprise tools? In my research, I often use interactive plotting tools to summarize my data. Many of my reports use `plotly`, which is sadly [losing support in R.](https://community.plotly.com/t/retire-the-documentation-for-r-matlab-julia-and-f/94147?_gl=1) Recently, I've been learning more about other options that support interactive R plots, which inspired a class presentation summarizing my findings. Check out this [demo](tech-tools.html) I put together!

## Time for a plot twist 📖

Speaking of childhood TV, happy 20th birthday to Hannah Montana! There will DEFINITELY be a blog post coming at some point about the [20 year reunion special.](https://hannahmontana.fandom.com/wiki/Hannah_Montana_20th_Anniversary_Special)
